title: schefflera rubiginosa
intro: Schefflera rubiginosa, also known as the Australian Umbrella Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Schefflera rubiginosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
